_meta.resume_note: The complete official 2025-2026 Programs of Study inventory contains no general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS.

none_found_sources.locator: Complete Programs of Study table, including all AA, AS, AA-T, and AS-T awards; no Economics award is listed

notes: Coalinga's complete 2025-2026 award inventory does not publish an Economics-titled associate degree. Business Administration 2.0, Business Management, and Liberal Arts: Social and Behavioral Science are umbrella or adjacent awards and are outside this pass.
